title: ZENODO-DOI — SOVEREIGN-TRACE-PROTOCOL
entry: Zenodo DOI issued for SOVEREIGN-TRACE-PROTOCOL repository. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18941392. Archived by CERN - permanent academic citation handle. Appears in academic databases. Added to CITATION.cff. March 10, 2026. Author: Sheldon K. Salmon.
